title: Rapid Vulnerability Exploit & Emergency Patch Defense
subtitle: Zero-day exploitation detection, virtual patching, and emergency remediation

steps.title: Perimeter Device Exploit
steps.description: Attacker exploits CVE in internet-facing appliance to gain initial shell access.

steps.title: System Reconnaissance
steps.description: Execute recon commands (whoami, systeminfo) to map compromised environment.

steps.title: Web Shell Deployment
steps.description: Deploy encrypted web shell to web root for persistent access.

steps.title: Exploit Chain Alert
steps.description: Sentinel and CrowdStrike detect anomalous web server child processes.

steps.title: Host Isolation
steps.description: CLAW auto-contains exploited host via CrowdStrike network containment.

steps.title: WAF Rule Deployment
steps.description: Deploy virtual patches to WAF blocking exploitation patterns.

steps.title: Vulnerability Scan
steps.description: Emergency scan identifies all assets vulnerable to exploited CVE.

steps.title: Emergency Patch Deployment
steps.description: Coordinate emergency patching across all vulnerable assets.

steps.title: Remove Persistence
steps.description: Identify and remove all web shells and persistence mechanisms.

steps.title: Patch Verification
steps.description: Verify patch deployment, scan for residual vulnerabilities.
